caption: The video appears to be shot through a night vision device, giving it a distinctive green hue. It captures a group of soldiers engaged in what seems to be a nighttime operation or training exercise. Initially, several soldiers are seen carrying a stretcher, possibly evacuating an injured person. The scene then shifts to show two soldiers walking towards the camera, with one of them holding a weapon and the other appearing to be in a supportive role. The environment suggests an outdoor setting, likely a military base or training ground, with structures and lights visible in the background. The overall atmosphere is tense and focused, indicative of a serious and coordinated military activity.
